description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a spacious flat surface, featuring two large computer monitors mounted on adjustable arms, a keyboard, and a mouse. The desk has a clean, minimalist design with a solid tabletop and integrated storage on one side, including drawers and open shelving. The monitor arms are attached to the back edge of the desk, allowing for flexible positioning of the screens. The desk's legs are sturdy and geometric, with one side forming a blocky support structure and the other side incorporating the storage units. The color scheme is primarily white and gray, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance suitable for professional or home office environments. The materials appear to be a combination of wood or engineered wood, metal for the monitor arms, and plastic for the accessories.
description: A modern, rectangular desk with dual monitor arms, integrated storage drawers, and a clean white and gray finish. It features a spacious work surface and sturdy geometric supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual monitors, keyboard, mouse, and the main work surface with storage drawers visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open shelving and drawers beneath the desk, as well as the monitor arms extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitors, the monitor arms, and the solid structure of the desk's rear support.
description_view_3: Angled view from the storage side, emphasizing the depth of the drawers and the arrangement of the monitor arms and cables.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the keyboard, mouse, and open access to the drawers and shelves, while the monitors are positioned at the back edge of the desk.
